summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Viikinkitapahtumat (Finnish viking events) app. 28/28 backend pytest cases pass covering health, JWT auth (cookie + bearer), public event CRUD, admin moderation flows, category filter, and authorization checks. Frontend e2e Playwright covered home/featured, language switcher (FI/EN/SV), events page (calendar+list tabs, category filter), event detail navigation, public submit form (creates pending event + success screen), admin login redirect, admin dashboard pending list, approve action, mobile hamburger nav (390px), and PWA (manifest link + service-worker registered). All flows green.

minor.issue: Cookie set with samesite=none + secure=true. Works in this https preview, but in plain http/local dev the cookie would be dropped. Bearer-token fallback in localStorage masks this.
status query param accepts arbitrary strings (e.g. status=foobar) and returns []; not validated against EventStatus literal. Low priority, no security impact.

issues: Confirm dialog text is just '?' (window.confirm('?')) for delete action — looks unfinished even if functional.
Toast messages are bare 'OK' / 'Error' / 'Failed to load' (English-only, not localised via t()).

action_items: (Optional) Localise admin toast/confirm messages via i18n t() instead of hardcoded 'OK'/'Error'/'?'.
(Optional) Validate /api/admin/events?status=... against EventStatus literal (currently silently returns empty list for invalid values).
critical_code_review_comments: Auth cookie uses samesite=none + secure=true unconditionally — fine for the deployed https preview but will not work in plain-http local dev. The Bearer/localStorage fallback covers this in practice.
submit_event endpoint correctly forces status='pending' and ignores any client-provided status (model uses extra='ignore' on EventCreate which doesn't include status). Good.
_id is consistently excluded via projection({_id:0}) in all reads and via _serialize_event in the create response — no ObjectId leakage.
Datetimes are stored as ISO strings — JSON-safe.
seed_admin is idempotent and updates the password hash if env ADMIN_PASSWORD changes — matches playbook.
No brute-force lockout / rate limiting on /api/auth/login. Acceptable for a small admin-only login but worth flagging.
AdminDashboard.jsx uses window.confirm('?') — placeholder string, should be a proper localised confirmation message.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed events (market, battle, other) and clean them up via admin DELETE at the end of each test class / session. Verified zero TEST_ leftovers after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py covers all auth/event/admin flows (28 tests, all passing). Use Bearer token from POST /api/auth/login for admin requests. JWT cookie also works (samesite=none, secure). Public submit -> status=pending; only approved events visible on GET /api/events and GET /api/events/{id} (404 if pending). Frontend testids are well-defined: brand-link, nav-events, lang-switcher, lang-option-{fi|en|sv}, events-tabs, tab-calendar/list, filter-category, filter-option-{cat}, submit-form, field-*, submit-event-btn, submit-success, login-email, login-password, login-submit, admin-status-tabs, admin-tab-{status}, admin-row-{id}, approve-{id}, reject-{id}, delete-{id}, mobile-menu-toggle, mnav-{path}, back-link, event-detail. PWA manifest + service worker confirmed registered.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — all targeted features pass.
